statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next roadmap tooling slice.

Changed [Invoke-SiteAudit.ps1](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/tools/audit/Invoke-SiteAudit.ps1) so the main audit wrapper now:

- Includes `quick-sheet.html` in the default page set.
- Accepts `-BrowserPath`.
- Runs `Invoke-GarageRestoreAudit.ps1` by default.
- Passes `-SkipScreenshots` through to the restore audit.
- Adds `-SkipBrowserSmoke` and `-SkipGarageRestoreAudit` for targeted runs.

Updated Anton/state docs: [ANTON.md](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/ANTON.md), [AGENT_STATE.md](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/AGENT_STATE.md), [AGENT_BACKLOG.md](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/AGENT_BACKLOG.md), [ANTON_ROADMAP.md](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/ANTON_ROADMAP.md), and [SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md).

Verification:
- `Test-InternalLinks.ps1` passed for 16 HTML files.
- `Invoke-GarageRestoreAudit.ps1 -Tag audit-v274 -SkipScreenshots` passed.
- `Invoke-SiteAudit.ps1 -Pages @('garage.html') -Tag audit-v274-final -SkipScreenshots -SkipBrowserSmoke` passed.
- Full wrapper without `-SkipBrowserSmoke` ran links and Garage restore validation, then hit the known pre-existing Edge dump-DOM blocker: `garage.html is missing main landmark after browser render`.

No UI changed, so I did not capture new screenshots. Next clean slice: replace or bypass the flaky Edge dump-DOM smoke path with a Playwright/Chrome smoke runner.
